Container.Name: TuneLog-Backend
Container.Overview: TuneLog backend — watches your Navidrome listening activity in real time via SSE, logs skip/partial/positive/repeat signals and automatically generates personalised playlists per user pushed directly to Navidrome.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Path where TuneLog stores its SQLite databases (tunelog.db, songlist.db, users.db).

Config.Name: Navidrome URL
Config.Description: Full URL of your Navidrome instance. Example: http://192.168.1.80:4533

Config.Name: Music Folder ID
Config.Description: (Optional) Navidrome music folder ID to restrict sync to a specific library. Leave blank to sync all libraries. Find available IDs at GET /api/music-folders.
